title: Work Report 工作汇报
scene: 员工向经理汇报工作进展

lines.en: Hi, here is the weekly report you asked for.
Thanks. How is the project going?
We are 80 percent done. The design part is finished.
lines.zh: 我们完成了80%。设计部分已经做完了。

lines.en: They are happy with the layout but want to change the colors.
lines.zh: 他们对布局满意，但想修改颜色。

lines.en: Can we finish the changes by Friday?
lines.zh: 我们能在周五前完成修改吗？

lines.en: I think so. I will confirm with the team today.
lines.zh: 应该可以。我今天会和团队确认。
好的，有进展随时告诉我。

lines.en: No problem. I will send an update tomorrow.
lines.zh: 没问题，我明天会发进展更新。
